description: Easy to use and great customer service. Very helpful and patient.
author: Terry B.
pros: Great customer service. I like the flexibility with commissions and no subscription fees. I also like that they are constantly updating the technology.
cons: Sometimes the booking fees can turn off the customer from booking.

author: Mauricio D.
pros: TripWorks' best feature is its top client service. The set up was a breeze with Tripwork's team, we had two calls to customize their platform according to our specific products and needs. Afterwards, a dedicated account manager is assigned to you so that you can email or set up calls for any follow-up questions (which I have generously used). Besides client service, the platform did solve many of the issues we had been struggling with such as having multiple resellers and integrating all of the bookings into one calendar.
cons: There isn't much to complain about Tripworks. The main issue is that it has so many features that it takes a while to properly get to know the platform and everything that it can do. I have been stumped a couple of times on how to proceed, but TripWorks' team have been quick to reply to my emails or get on a call to help me out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We decided on Tripworks after a very length research process into other options. While we were initially understanding that no system is perfect, over time, we’ve found that the cons seem to be stacking up. Constant issues, slow loading, and feeling unsupported are leading us to question whether we made the right call. We will keep working with them since we’ve put a huge amount of work into setting up and using this system, but it is disappointing to feel like we aren’t getting what was advertised. We regularly feel like we’re fighting the system, when the goal of this type of software is to make our lives easier. We are intending to give them a chance to resolve these issues, but are strongly considering exploring other options.
author: Rowena B.
pros: A clean, good-looking system with a simple booking flow. Great options for dynamic pricing, as well as offering different pricing to resellers. Flexibility to manage bookings, including the ability to manually adjust ticket prices or comp tickets, makes it much less rigid than other systems.
cons: We’re using resources for guide scheduling, and this has proven to be a mixed bag as the resource settings aren’t as flexible as we need. The system’s focus on per-participant details means that the default receipts and booking details can be lengthy for large bookings. It would also be nice to have an option for a requested booking that doesn’t require a deposit to be able to quote groups. More issues have started to pop up since the initial review. Some are minor like add-ons we’ve applied disappearing from the booking, while others are major and have impacted our business more dramatically, like payment links that don’t load and booking errors on e-commerce and back-end bookings. We have regularly been reporting issues, but little to no progress is made on things that are having a major negative impact on our business. Our support has gone rapidly downhill since our on-boarding experience. We have been passed through a couple of account managers and the general support staff, all of whom mean well and do their best, but haven’t been able to really address our concerns.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A good value for even a small business
description: My staff is able to easily log in to perform all of the functions each person needs to do. The calendar makes things easy, and the tour guide assigning feature really helps us.
author: Mindy S.
pros: There is strong and responsive customer support. The interface is very intuitive, and works well on my laptop or phone, though I prefer the larger screen view.
cons: TW does not charge tax on credit card fees, which are taxable. We figure those taxes manually. It's a small amount, so it is not a big deal to do, but it is one more step to take to pay accurate taxes.

description: Overall I enjoy Tripworks much better than Peek Pro or Fareharbor. I especially love the ease to set up affiliate company's to handle third party bookings.
author: Dennis D.
pros: The setup of our tour options, vouchers and gift card options are extremely easy. The dedicated customer service with an actual account manager that i can talk to when I have an issue is one of top features I love. The payment processing is fast and the flexibility to modify features is top notch.
cons: I wish customers had a way to cancel tours and request refunds themselves so we didn't have to stop and manually cancel the reservation. It just takes time out of my admin team's day to do this. Also, when a reservation is cancelled or a draft is removed, I would be great if it didn't show up as just deleted, it would be much better if it showed up in the sales screen as actually cancelled. It just crowds the sales screen when multiple of the same activity for the same person shows up as a draft or deleted. Lastly, Tripworks would be elite if they set up a way to automatically pay out commissions for bookings through affiliate partners instead of my accounting team having to manually calculate and pay out commissions.

description: I really like Tripworks. However, my experience has changed. It seems to be the new business model of a criminal lack of accountability by those at the top. I have no access nor knowledge of this company. All the people with whom I can interact are spread liberally about the U.S. and maybe the world for all I know. The people I started with (except [sensitive content hidden]) and whom I was very comfortable and had great faith in, have left. Recently, [sensitive content hidden] once again had to step in and resolve a big problem. She did a great job and when i asked to be able to contact her boss directly to praise her, I got an email telling me to wrote a review. The result is an additional bad taste in my mouth and a real annoyance. Tripworks is lucky it works for my business and that it is such a hassle to change products (and their competition to date, sucks). So while I do like Tripworks, I am concerned for the future and I consider the [sensitive content hidden] and other company leaders either negligent or rather incompetent. This business model of invisible corporate leadership and companies that exist only in the virtual world cannot continue forever in my opinion. (and I run a Virtual Reality Entertainment Complex!) To conclude, Tripworks is great but it is best if you have someone who can learn to program, alter and troubleshoot the system in house because otherwise you may have to accept a really rather extended period of waiting for satisfaction. Also once again, [sensitive content hidden] is amazing!
author: Joe M.
pros: We had multiple software be unable to handle our needs in the past. Tripworks has been by far the best. When my problems are escalated to a higher up person, they get handled. [sensitive content hidden], is excellent at her job, both in her knowledge of the software and how she handles customer service, especially angry customers. Whoever the higher ups in this company are, they are so lucky to have her and from what I've seen, if she leaves, they are screwed.
cons: They need to up their game in regards to Point of sale and customer service. Recently, it appears that they've had an irregularly high degree of turnover and it is affecting the customer service experience. In the past at least on weekdays, I was getting someone who really knew the software. I anticipated the weekend person would be less knowledgeable. Lately, I feel as if I am getting a novice whenever I call and they are reading off of a script. I quite often have to wait days to get a problem resolved.

description: Working with Tripworks is easy, efficient and hassle free. Whenever we have a need or question, it is handled in a timely manner (faster than I would expect) and they always make sure to let you know they are there to help.
author: Dana H.
pros: Customer support is "On It!" and super helpful. As we set up our system they are ever present to assist and guide you in best practices.
cons: Updated UI was not necessarily an "improvement". The new interface, while "looking prettier" means more scrolling to find what you need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall it has been a positive experience for our business!
author: Audrey E.
pros: The Tripworks team is wonderful about getting back to our business in a timely manner, always assists us with our questions or concerns; providing quick solutions each time.
cons: Sometimes it glitches out and the screen goes blank at random times.

description: Great customer service and product, easy for customers to book.
author: Christopher H.
pros: Able to use in field and at office. Integrated system.
cons: Some things about it are illogical. The fees are a lot too.

description: excellent customer service, easy to use software
author: Cara M.
pros: They were quick to respond to my requests and they were fast and accurate with a solution
cons: nothing I can think of at this time but will give it some thought
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Most comprehensive booking system on the market.
description: The initial contact made a great impression: easy going, with no aggresive marketing. On all other platforms we used in the past, once we were all open running, the support became wague and hard to reach. With TripWorks the support is still here, ready to help.
author: Wojciech W.
pros: Everything we needed comes in one packet. That includes our rather complicated layout of various activities, equipment, timeslots etc. They made it all work seamlessly! We tried three booking systems in two years. TripWorks is the first which comes with waivers that our customers find easy to sign. No more hanging around at the check-in with paperwork. Nearly 100% of waivers are now signed online. Result!Very easy to implement on your website.
cons: The system is very comprehensive. It can do virtually anything, but that comes with a price. It is not easy to set up. Being computer savvy and patient, I managed most of it but got stuck on configuring resources. The team was very helpful and we had my complicated layout all fully tested and ready within a week.Integration with Google calendar isn't working.

author: Andrea M.
pros: Ease of use, great customer support, great GUI, compatibility with OTAs
cons: Some features could be implemented in a better way

author: Fernanda D.
pros: Love it is a product easy to use and that in case any feature is not available, the team work to make it happen since they understand our business. Also the customer service is the best, big fan of [sensitive content hidden] that always is there to assist and answer any question.
cons: That there are still features missing but I know the IT team are working on that.
author_profession: Director of Operations and Customer Service

description: Tripworks makes many tasks easier for us and our business allowing us the extra time we need to take care of other tasks.
author: Debra F.
pros: Everything we need is all in one place and program.
cons: No true complaints about this program as it seems to fit our needs.

author: Greg K.
pros: The TripWorks app is really easy to use. Once you set up your listing, guests can reserve on the app or via email, text messages or even Facebook.I've used TripWorks for over 6 monts as the exclusive service provider for my hotel. TripWorks has been a great source of income for me, and I really like being able to give my guests the choice between booking via the app or through my website. This app has been very successful for me.
cons: If you are a traveler or tour operator, you should definitely give it a try. In general, I was very pleased with the ease of use it provided and I did not have any problems.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Perfect overall experience with Tripworks, try this booking software it’s great
author: Henry G.
pros: Always ahead of the competition , tecnico support is great. Communication is great.
cons: Do not have anything that I like the least

author: Summer M.
pros: It’s super easy to use and makes figuring out out work schedule so much easier!
cons: Nothing!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: TripWorks is better than fareharbor and peek
description: Overall they are a great booking software to work with. We moved to them because they had better technology to help us earn more revenue than Fareharbor or Peek, and we have.
author: Eliav C.
pros: They are a small agile company and do listen to users about product changes. 3 things I really like about the software (Were all our ideas that they added in the last 12 months): 1. Allow users to reschedule their tour on their own when we have to cancel for any reason (Mainly weather) 2. Allow us to see draft purchases right away and call those prospects to close them (They are the only platform that currently allows this) 3. Tipping feature is awesome. We used to get $250-$400 in tips per tour. Now we get $800-$1000 per tour group.
cons: They can be slow to build new features, however, they do eventually build them. The ones they do build end up being features that make us more money.

author: Andrew B.
pros: As a weather dependent to her operator, we are constantly rescheduling our guess and adjusting reservations based on the timing and the weather forecast for a particular day. With any other software that we investigated, rescheduling was a time consuming task, often taking several hours a day. This single feature alone saved our team at least 2 to 3 hours per day and solved numerous issues. from a client perspective, this software allows them to simply click a link and go through the process as opposed to tons of back-and-forth friction points, which used to hinder sales. Nearly every other point in the software surly self-explanatory and intuitive, and to me from our side and the client experience side, with easy to use features, attractive interface, and more. Further, support is incredibly responsive to any means, often helping solve issues in minutes or hours that used to take days, weeks, or simply ignored with our past providers. It was the best decision we made for our business, and as much as I think that I want all of my competitors to switch, I hope they don’t find out!
cons: There were a few initial items that seemed like they should have known already, however they were very responsive to listen, learn our needs, and solve the issues nearly immediately! Further, they went above and beyond with customer service to actually take the lead on implementation issues and have it resolved before they called us back.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Tour Booking Platform that Checks Most of the Boxes
description: I've had a great experience! I haven't had any major issues, and when questions arose, the customer service took care of them quickly.
author: CHRISTIAN H.
pros: TripWorks is a modern and easy-to-use system with superb customer service and a platform that will make it easy for my customers to book tours and for me to manage those tours. They have been very thoughtful in what features they've prioritized and have made it their mission to help tour companies like me increase bookings through an intuitive platform.
cons: I wish there was a "waitlist" option embedded in the system that other platforms have.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Connor W.
pros: what we like most about tripworks is its ease of use
cons: certain customer service representatives, others are exceptional

description: The customer service that has been provided by TripWorks has been better than customer service from any other platform that I have interacted with. The individuals are quick to respond, and efficient in solving difficulties, or creating a more streamlined process.
author: Victoria B.
pros: One of the things that I was expecting to be harder was the launch with specific times on each date. But after providing TripWorks with the information, they performed the legwork to have the information integrated and translated into appropriate booking times and availability. If a schedule changes, it is also very simple within the phone app to "close" or "open" the availability with the click of one button. TripWorks integrates payment to make the process simple and streamlined for guests as well!
cons: The one thing that I would like to see if some simple changes to the final payment and tipping, as tips are a large perk to operating a specialty tour. Currently, after the deposit is paid and the tour has been completed, the screen that comes available for the client has percentages of the booking to pay toward a tip. The biggest difficulty with this is it does not include the deposit price in that percentage. I would like to see percentage of tip reflect the entirety of the cost of the excursion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My new booking system provider reliable
description: I'm pretty satisfied for you service guys, thank you!
author: Rey A.
pros: Their customer service is in real time 24/7 real helpful for issues coming.
cons: Not at all, everything's been good. I just would like to have the booking experience in other languages for the user, as spanish.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Definitely a Must for any tour company
author: Adam W.
pros: The most important part of this product is the customer service. I often have special requests and needs to operate my business and Tripworks does their best to accommodate my request. They are easy to reach and this is huge, because if something does malfunction they fix it. You don't have to wait several business days and lose out on sales. They know how important your business is to you. In fact this is the reason I switched to Tripworks. The software in general is very easy to use. They are constantly changing it so that it works best for the users. You can even submit requests for changes. My favorite part of this software is by far their communication.
cons: Honestly this was a bulk availability editor but like I said in the pros, I submitted a feature request and now this editor is wonderful. No real cons.

description: From the first communication with TripWorks, their discussions with me were upfront and concise. I knew exactly how long it would take to build my platform, how long the training process would be and how long it would take to get up and running and most specifically ONLINE. My customers love the booking process. My employees absolutely love the booking platform and the ease of use. Every time I have a question or concern, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN], My Account Manager, responds timely with easy to understand answers to my questions. She is always at the ready for a Google Meeting for hands-on training and assistance. I would highly advise any leisure or travel company to consider TripWorks. Their customer service is unbeatable and they are just great people to work with!
author: Karen S.
pros: I love the ease of use of the entire platform. From communication with customers via text or email to managing resources within our fleet, the process is absolutely a breeze. TripWorks offers so much more than our prior booking software for communicating with potential customers. Capturing abandoned carts and offering promo deals is allowing our company to grab potential customers and make them return customers. I learn new things every day about our booking platform and I have failed to find something that doesn't give me so much more than I thought I was getting.
cons: Nothing I would change! It's just that good!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
